summary: The clearest move is [Anthropic](https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/anthropic/jobs/5319626008) standing up a London Safeguards enforcement bench, not just hiring one trust-and-safety generalist: five analyst lanes split by abuse type, plus a Safeguards PM, which reads like operational enforcement capacity being carved into specialist queues. Behind that, [xAI](https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/xai/jobs/5032210007) and [ElevenLabs](https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/elevenlabs/10f5c0c0-43a3-4485-8e20-db677f892b6e) are doing the quieter legal/compliance buildout — xAI with UK, energy/infrastructure, and corporate counsel roles, ElevenLabs with IP, employment, and compliance. [Cohere](https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/cohere/bde93d36-4a41-4c8c-bd98-b4e44f9061e4) is worth watching but looks less like a London policy move than a comms-and-government-affairs tidying: US government affairs, global policy narratives, and audit/SOX are adjacent signals rather than a UK public-affairs standup. I’m not confident xAI’s counsel additions are pure growth, because two counsel roles disappeared at the same time, so this may be a reshuffle as much as a scale-up.
